Body.Content:
Security and IT admins can increase domain-level control with the Tenant Allow/Block List feature in the Microsoft Defender portal to block domains for Microsoft Teams. This post was published previously with incorrect information and has been corrected. We apologize for the inconvenience.

GA date: December CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Teams integration with Microsoft Defender for Office Tenant/Allow Block List for domains
